title: Twitter's new X.com domain is redirecting some users, including cofounder Jack Dorsey, to a GoDaddy ad
text: Elon Musk said Sunday that X.com had started redirecting users to Twitter. But several users reported that it instead showed them an advert for web-hosting company GoDaddy.

title: GoDaddy Inc. Completes Refinancing of Existing Amendment No. 6 Term Loans
text: TEMPE, Ariz. , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY), the company that helps entrepreneurs thrive, Go Daddy Operating Company, LLC and GD Finance Co, LLC (each a subsidiary of GoDaddy Inc. and together, the "Borrowers") closed the credit agreement refinancing announced on July 14, 2023.

title: GoDaddy Inc. to Announce Second-Quarter 2023 Financial Results on Thursday, August 3, 2023
text: TEMPE, Ariz. , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY), the company that helps entrepreneurs thrive, will release financial results for the second quarter of 2023 on Thursday, August 3, 2023, after the U.S. stock market closes.
